nasb.text: He will give up Israel on account of the sins of Jeroboam, which he committed and with which he made Israel to sin.”

esv.text: And he will give Israel up because of the sins of Jeroboam, which he sinned and made Israel to sin.”

cnv.text: 為了耶羅波安所犯的罪，又為了他使以色列人所犯的罪，耶和華必丟棄以色列人。”

ccb.text: 因为耶罗波安犯罪作孽，使以色列人陷入罪中，耶和华必抛弃以色列。”
